channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Mass Protests in Delhi Signal Growing Dissent Against Modi Government
item.description: The international media highlighted the massive protests in Delhi against the BJP government, framing them as one of the largest expressions of dissent in recent years. The Cockroach Janta Party's mar...

item.title: Meta's Smartglasses and the Risks of Covert Child Filming in the Age of AI
item.description: The article discusses the potential risks of Meta's new smartglasses, which can covertly film children, raising concerns about privacy and the misuse of AI technology. It references a personal anecdot...

item.title: The 764 Network: Exploiting Youth in Cybercrime and Self-Harm
item.description: The article details the activities of the 764 network, an international cybercrime group that exploits vulnerable youth, particularly LGBTQI+ individuals, racial minorities, and those with mental heal...

item.title: George Ruto Shares Light-hearted Farm Video Holding a Baby Goat at Intona Farm
item.description: George Ruto, President William Ruto’s son, attracted attention online after sharing a TikTok video showing him carrying a live baby goat at the family’s Intona Farm in Kilgoris, Narok County. In the c...

item.title: Wife Defends Herself Against Allegations of Financial Misconduct in Divorce Case
item.description: Mrs Waweru, wife of Captain Waweru Mwangi, has spoken out against allegations that she left him penniless and transferred family property to her name during their divorce. The couple, married for 37 y...

item.title: Nigerian Lawyer Rodiyah Omotoyosi Mikhail Sparks Debate Over Niqab at Call to Bar
item.description: Rodiya Omotoyosi Mikhail, a Nigerian lawyer, made headlines after her Call to Bar ceremony in September 2025 where she wore a niqab beneath her legal attire. The photos of her appearance went viral on...

item.title: International student numbers in Australia remain stable post-pandemic
item.description: The article examines the misconceptions surrounding international student numbers in Australia, clarifying that while net overseas migration figures suggest growth, the actual number of students physi...

item.title: Canadian Conservatives Must Prioritize National Interests Over Foreign Influence
item.description: The article critiques Canadian conservatives for aligning too closely with U.S. political figures like Donald Trump while neglecting domestic priorities. It argues that the Liberal Party of Canada has...

item.title: eThekwini suspends electricity debt relief due to meter shortages and audit concerns
item.description: The eThekwini Municipality has suspended its electricity debt relief programme, known as the Energy Management 80/20 credit control initiative, due to a critical shortage of electricity meters. This d...

item.title: Review of 'The Odyssey': A Critical Analysis of the Film's Themes and Cast
item.description: This article provides an in-depth analysis of the film 'The Odyssey,' directed by Christopher Nolan. It explores the movie's narrative, which reimagines Homer's ancient epic with modern themes of war,...

item.title: UAE's Adnoc Advances Gas Project Amid Regional Conflicts
item.description: The article discusses the decision by the United Arab Emirates' national oil company, Adnoc, to proceed with its gas project despite ongoing regional conflicts. The project, which is part of the UAE's...

item.title: iranian minister's visit to pakistan amid us-iran tensions and regional diplomacy
item.description: iran’s interior minister eskandar momeni arrived in pakistan on an official visit and held talks with prime minister shehbaz sharif at the pm house in islamabad. the meeting, announced by the pm’s off...

item.title: UK's New Africa Strategy: Shifting Aid to Project Financing
item.description: The article discusses the United Kingdom's evolving approach to its relationship with Africa, focusing on Nigeria's Lagos ports as a case study. Britain's new strategy under Prime Minister Andy Burnha...

item.title: Judy Ann's 'Call My Manager' Premieres on HBO Max on August 13
item.description: Judy Ann Santos' new project, 'Call My Manager,' is set to debut on HBO Max on August 13, 2026. The series, which marks Santos' return to television after a hiatus, has been highly anticipated by fans...

item.title: Fox News Criticizes Trump's Iran Policy Amid Political Concerns
item.description: The article discusses how prominent Fox News commentators are growing critical of President Donald Trump's handling of the Iran conflict, highlighting political and military challenges. Britt Hume, a ...

item.title: Inflation Slowed in June, But Grocery Bills Reflect Higher Costs
item.description: Recent data from the Bank of Canada indicates that inflation in Canada slowed to 3.1% in June from 3.4% in May, marking a slight decrease in annual inflation rates. However, this national trend does n...

item.title: UK government borrowing lower than expected in June
item.description: The UK government borrowed £16bn in June, slightly below the £16.3bn forecast by the Office for Budget Responsibility (OBR), according to official data. This marks a £7.9bn reduction compared to June ...

item.title: Brisbane Lions' Future Uncertain as Key Players and Coach Face Contract Decisions
item.description: The Brisbane Lions face critical decisions as key players Kai Lohmann and Logan Morris approach contract expirations, with coach Chris Fagan's future also in question. Lohmann's stellar form, includin...

item.title: Common myna's journey from pest control to invasive species in Australia
item.description: The common myna, originally brought to Melbourne in 1862 as a biological control agent for crop pests, has since become one of the world’s most notorious invasive bird species. Initially introduced to...

item.title: CBS News Last-Minute Decision to Air Trump Speech Surprises Staff
item.description: CBS News faced internal confusion and surprise when it abruptly changed its plan to cover Donald Trump's national address. Initially, staffers were told the speech would only be available on the netwo...
